title: マーベラス売りの少女

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
So marvelous! ☆ Care for something
marvelous? ★

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Care for something marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! How marvelous! ☆ Care for
something absolutely marvelous? ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after running into Marvelous Sunday
and Ikuno Dictus, I find myself being greeted in a
bizarre manner.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! ☆ We're handing out the
marvelousness that everyone loves! Care for
something marvelous? ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's almost like she's reenacting The Little Match Girl...
choice_data_list: You're in on this, too, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Marvelous invited me to help out.
Distributing wonder and happiness around the
academy is a commendable notion, so I decided
to join in.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, marvelous! ☆ Ikuno is the greatest advocate
of all things marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you doing over there?!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
There have been reports of strange students
wandering around saying odd things! Stop this
absurdity at once!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But Teacher! It's Marvelous! Marvelous, I say! ☆ This world needs marvelousness. ★

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what on earth are you talking about?! Just
cease this dubious behavior!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Forgive my impertinence, but there's nothing
dubious about what we're doing.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
This is an altruistic service. Marvelous is
attempting to use wonder itself as a means to
deliver happiness, excitement, and joy to all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There is nothing wrong about that, and I deem
her conduct virtuous.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Still... are you sure you're not scheming
anything devious?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous does not harbor any ulterior motives.
She has a genuine desire to share things she
believes are wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No scheming is underway here. The proof lies in
the fact that she doesn't seek any compensation
for her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: A splendid explanation, Ikuno! You are indeed marvelous! ☆ Supremely marvelous! ★
choice_data_list:
So what happens if I want something marvelous
from you?

So what happens if I want something marvelous
from you?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you raise a valid point! ☆ It looks like it's
time to get marvelous! ★ Trainer, what manner of
marvelous thing do you desire?
choice_data_list:
I've been stressing about my calorie intake
lately...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ You seem very earnest about this! Okay,
here we go! Some marvelous comfort is coming
your way! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon saying this, Marvelous Sunday lights a
single match.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: What the?! What's happening?!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Sheep
text_block_list.text: Baaaa.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oho, they are indeed very fluffy. Hehe, here
doggy, here kitty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus has already adapted to the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! They're so fluffy! Being around all
these furry creatures is sooo soothing!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! ☆ I know just what you mean! Okay, here we
go! A marvelously full stomach is coming your
way! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon saying this, Marvelous Sunday lights a
single match.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: What the?! What's happening?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lavish banquet is laid out before our eyes.
Turkey, carrot hamburger steaks, gratin, cake—it
all looks delicious.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
My, what a splendid feast. It smells scrumptious
and the flavors are exquisite. My mouth is in total
bliss.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... The dessert is delectable, too. I would
very much like for McQueen to taste it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus has already adapted to the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
D-delicious! Everything here is simply amazing!
Can we really eat all this without worrying about
the calories?!
choice_data_list: All this food is mouthwateringly good!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
How was it? ☆ Did you enjoy my marvelous Little
Match Girl experience? ★

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: It was... marvelous!
choice_data_list: Bow to all that is maaarvelooous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ☆ Wonderful! I'm glad that you've all come
to realize why marvelous things are so, well...
marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I believe the matter is settled, then.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Wooooow! ☆ All that is marvelous is wondrous! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the sense I may have gotten involved in
something I shouldn't have—something way out
there—but it certainly was a fulfilling day.
